00007FF9D88FD2FD lea rax,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAA500]       00007FF9D8AAA500 "onecoreuap\\windows\\directx\\dxg\\d3d11\\D3DCore\\Inc\\DXGIDevice.inl"
00007FF9D891101A lea rdx,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAA918]       00007FF9D8AAA918 "QueryAdapterInfo (KMTQAITYPE_PHYSICALADAPTERDEVICEIDS)"
00007FF9D8911D89 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAE198]        00007FF9D8AAE198 "CreateDevice"
00007FF9D8913A95 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAE8B8]        00007FF9D8AAE8B8 "DestroyDevice"
00007FF9D89483B6 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAE198]        00007FF9D8AAE198 "CreateDevice"
00007FF9D894871C lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAE8B8]        00007FF9D8AAE8B8 "DestroyDevice"
00007FF9D8956302 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9B20]        00007FF9D8AB9B20 "D3D11CreateDevice: The D3D11_CREATE_DEVICE_ENABLE_INCREASED_PRIORITY flag may only be used if the calling process possesses the SeIncBasePriority privilege."
00007FF9D89563B9 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9BC0]        00007FF9D8AB9BC0 "D3D11CreateDevice: The output parameter pFeatureLevel must not overlap with the input paramteter array pFeatureLevels."
00007FF9D89563C2 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8ABA1D0]        00007FF9D8ABA1D0 "D3D11CreateDevice: When creating a non-D3D_DRIVER_TYPE_SOFTWARE device, Software handle must be NULL."
00007FF9D89563DB lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9C40]        00007FF9D8AB9C40 "D3D11CreateDevice: There's no reason to pass in an array larger than %d elements, as it implies that either certain D3D_FEATURE_LEVELs will be tried multiple times or never succeed. FeatureLevels was set to %d. Only D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_9_1, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_9_2, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_9_3, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_10_0, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_10_1, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_11_0, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_11_1, D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_12_0 and D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_12_1 are supported."
00007FF9D89563F9 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9E40]        00007FF9D8AB9E40 "D3D11CreateDevice: The adapter obtained via IDXGIDevice::GetAdapter from a D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_9_* device can only be used to create other feature level 9 devices.  Because this device creation call only requests feature level 10 or higher it will fail."
00007FF9D895641E lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9F40]        00007FF9D8AB9F40 "D3D11CreateDevice: The adapter obtained via IDXGIDevice::GetAdapter from a D3D_FEATURE_LEVEL_9_* device can only be used to create other feature level 9 devices.  Higher feature levels are being ignored."
00007FF9D895648E lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8ABA010]        00007FF9D8ABA010 "D3D11CreateDevice: When creating a device from an existing adapter (i.e. pAdapter is non-NULL), DriverType must be D3D_DRIVER_TYPE_UNKNOWN."
00007FF9D895649A lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8ABA0A0]        00007FF9D8ABA0A0 "D3D11CreateDevice: When creating a device without an adapter (i.e. pAdapter is NULL), the DriverType designates the type of adapter to use; and must not be D3D_DRIVER_TYPE_UNKNOWN."
00007FF9D89564B3 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8ABA160]        00007FF9D8ABA160 "D3D11CreateDevice: When creating a D3D_DRIVER_TYPE_SOFTWARE device, Software handle must be non-NULL."
00007FF9D895685C lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AAE188]        00007FF9D8AAE188 "pfnCreateDevice"

00007FF9D8972C77 lea rdx,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AADC50]       00007FF9D8AADC50 "D3D11CreateDeviceAndSwapChainGenerated"

00007FF9D8978DCF lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9960]        00007FF9D8AB9960 "D3D11CreateDeviceForD3D12: You must specify a D3D12 device."
00007FF9D8978E49 lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB99F0]        00007FF9D8AB99F0 "D3D11CreateDeviceForD3D12: The output parameter pChosenFeatureLevel must not overlap with the input paramteter array pFeatureLevels."
00007FF9D8978E8B lea r8,qword ptr ds:[7FF9D8AB9A80]        00007FF9D8AB9A80 "D3D11CreateDeviceForD3D12: The NodeMask parameter must only have a single bit set."

00007FF9B96B34C6 lea rcx,qword ptr ds:[7FF9B9CBE3BE] 00007FF9B9CBE3BE L"Running a message loop synchronously in an event handler in Webview can cause reentrancy issue.
